name: Claap Async Video Collaboration Platform API
what_it_does: Async video collaboration platform with REST API — enabling teams to record, share, and discuss screen recordings and video messages with timestamped comments, AI-generated transcripts and summaries, meeting recording with action items, and sales call coaching, replacing synchronous meetings with contextual async video workflows.
use_cases: Recording and sharing async video messages via Claap API for automated video workflow integration
Querying Claap video transcripts and AI summaries via API for meeting intelligence pipelines
Integrating Claap meeting recordings with CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot) via API for sales call data
Managing Claap workspace content and team access via API for enterprise video library governance
Extracting action items and decisions from Claap AI meeting summaries via API for task automation
not_for: Live video conferencing (use Zoom or Google Meet — Claap is async video, not live meetings)
Video hosting and streaming (use Wistia or Vidyard for video marketing hosting)
Training video creation (use Loom or Camtasia for professional training content)
best_when: A distributed team needs to reduce synchronous meeting overhead by replacing status updates, reviews, and feedback sessions with async video messages — with AI transcription and threaded comments for asynchronous collaboration.
avoid_when: You need live video meetings, video marketing hosting, formal training video production, or your team has low async video adoption discipline.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow for user-delegated access. Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped with video content access controls. Webhook for video recording, processing, and comment events. REST API for video and workspace management. Integration with Slack, Notion, Salesforce, HubSpot, and Linear. SAML SSO for enterprise identity management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: limited video minutes, basic features
pricing.notes: French company (Paris). Founded 2021. Raised $9M seed (2022). Backed by Accel, Kima Ventures. YC-style startup competing with Loom. AI features: auto-transcription, meeting summary, action item extraction, sales call coaching. Strong integration with popular work tools (Slack, Notion, Linear, CRM). Async-first company culture product. Loom (acquired by Atlassian for $975M in 2023) validates the market. Claap differentiates with AI meeting intelligence and sales coaching.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per workspace; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for video and workspace management. OAuth2 auth with scopes. Good documentation with integration guides. Webhook for video events. AI transcript and summary access via API. French company with GDPR-first design. Rate limits not publicly documented. Early-stage startup — API stability may evolve.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Video reads fully idempotent. Transcript reads idempotent by video ID. AI summary reads idempotent. Video upload not idempotent — check for existing upload before creating.
known_agent_gotchas: Early-stage startup (2021) — API may change more frequently than established tools
AI transcript and summary require video processing time — asynchronous pipeline
Video content may include sensitive business discussions — restrict API access carefully
Rate limits not documented — test before production integration
GDPR compliance requires consent for recording participants — handle at application layer

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. EU data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. French company with GDPR-first design. Video content is highly sensitive — business conversations and screen recordings may contain confidential information. Ensure recording consent is handled at application layer (GDPR/CCPA). Webhook delivery should be verified via secret signature. SAML SSO for enterprise access control.
